description: Add phase PH-4 "Cross-cutting hardening & release" and bind slices SL-016 through SL-019 to it. This introduces structure absent from every v1 artifact, so it is recorded as a typed scope change before the mutation it authorizes. Authorized by DEC-029. No requirement, acceptance criterion or work item changes scope as a result; the four slices already existed in the roadmap ladder and had already shipped. The change is representational only. Re-applied on the 2.4.0 re-population of 2026-07-23.

Extend the v1 deployment target from on-prem-only to AWS cloud-hosted UAT + production. The charter and ADR-0013/CON-001/CON-003/INV-003 fixed a self-contained on-prem target; this change adds a cloud target hosted on AWS EC2 + Docker Compose, with Keycloak folded onto SQL Server, MinIO replaced by S3, and the container set consolidated. Introduces phase PH-5 and slices SL-020..SL-027, four Proposed ADRs (0034-0037), two defects (DEF-014/015), eleven acceptance criteria (AC-075..AC-085), risk rows, and open questions. Authorized by DEC-030. No PH-1..PH-4 requirement, AC, or work item changes scope; the on-prem P1-P19 ladder is unaffected and its artefacts are untouched. Recorded before the mutations it authorizes.
